block_01: Forex may not be an obvious choice for short deals, but this type of trading has a lot to offer. The most distinct benefit: accumulating profit from short deals instead of waiting for results from long-term investments. No overnight fee is an additional perk.
block_02: With short-term Forex trading, choosing the asset and the strategy is that much more important, since you’ll be opening dozens of deals within the day. Learn how to choose a Forex pair to trade, decide on a strategy and manage your risks at the same time.
block_03: Check the full article to know the 3 essential steps to short-term Forex trading.
